pin_entry.title: Enter PIN
pin_entry.desc: A PIN is required to disable Safe Mode.

error.locked: Too many failed attempts. Locked for {{seconds}}s

recovery.title: PIN Recovery
recovery.desc_format: Enter your Recovery Code (format: EMMM-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX). This will remove your PIN so you can set a new one.

error.invalid: Invalid recovery code. Please check and try again.

success.title: PIN Removed Successfully
success.desc: Your PIN has been cleared. Go to Settings → Privacy → Set PIN to create a new one.

recovery.removed: PIN Removed: Safe Mode is now unprotected.

settings.title: Safe Mode
settings.desc: When enabled, mods tagged with sensitive keywords are hidden from the library. Disabling this mode may require authentication if a PIN is set.

protection.title: Extra Keyword Protection
protection.desc: When this is ON, mods that match filtered keywords are hidden even if they are marked as safe.

security.title: Security PIN
security.status_set: A PIN is currently set. It is required to disable Safe Mode.
security.status_none: No PIN set. Anyone can toggle Safe Mode freely.
security.modal_set_desc: Create a secure PIN to protect Safe Mode settings.
security.modal_unlock_desc: Enter your current PIN to proceed.

switch.desc: Review the changes to your active loadout before switching corridors.

target_desc.system_fallback: Restoring mods remembered by corridor system state.

switch.missing_target: No saved target state. All mods will remain disabled.

recovery_modal.title: Save Your Recovery Code
recovery_modal.desc: This code is shown only once. Store it in a safe place — it's the only way to reset your PIN if you forget it.
recovery_modal.warning: If you lose this code and forget your PIN, you will need to manually reset the app database to clear it.
